cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Betty could have gone to the bakery. First, let me go through the information given step by step. Betty woke up at 5am. Then, Jessica saw her driving to the water park from 5am to 1pm. So that's the first time frame: 5am to 1pm, Betty was at the water park. Then Susan saw her stretching at a yoga studio from 1pm to 4pm. So after 1pm, she's at yoga until 4pm. Then Leslie saw her buying a phone at the electronics store from 4pm to 9pm. So from 4pm to 9pm, she's at the electronics store. The bakery was closed
